EphemerisSql.BodiesQuery: SELECT BodyId AS Id, Slug, DisplayName AS Name, Category FROM dbo.CelestialBodies ORDER BY SortOrder, DisplayName;
EphemerisSql.BodyBySlugQuery: SELECT TOP (1) BodyId AS Id, Slug, DisplayName AS Name, Category FROM dbo.CelestialBodies WHERE Slug = @slug;
EphemerisSql.SamplesRangeQuery: SELECT TOP (@limit) BodyId, SampleTimeUtc, X_AU AS X, Y_AU AS Y, Z_AU AS Z, VX_AUPerDay AS Vx, VY_AUPerDay AS Vy, VZ_AUPerDay AS Vz, Frame FROM dbo.EphemerisSamples WHERE BodyId = @bodyId AND SampleTimeUtc >= @startUtc AND SampleTimeUtc <= @endUtc ORDER BY SampleTimeUtc;
